issues.description: Blocker keyword text describes a reactive ability (opponent declares attack → you may rest this card), not a trigger. Should not be separate OnBlock effect. Blocker is implicit game mechanic.
OnAttacked trigger is incorrect. Blocker ability activates after opponent declares attack (OnAttack phase), not when this card is attacked. This misrepresents the mechanic.
Trigger should be EndOfTurn, not Activated. Text says '[End of Your Turn]' which is a scheduled trigger, not an activated ability. Also missing duration constraint.
Action is GiveDon but should be PlayFromHand or equivalent to 'set up' (activate) a DON card. GiveDon adds DON counters to a card; 'set as active' means flipping a resting DON to active.
Missing duration. '[End of Your Turn]' → should have duration constraint, likely 'DuringYourTurn' or conditional on turn phase.
